title: canarium littorale
intro: Canarium littorale, also known as the beach almond or white beach almond, is a species of evergreen tree native to Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Canarium littorale include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of using Canarium littorale include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against skin infections. The herbal preparations of Canarium littorale include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
